Back to Yoga

Yoga pose

Vraksasana

Tree pose develops balance, leg strength, confidence, and calm focus.

How to do Vraksasana

Stand tall, breathe steadily, and use a wall or chair nearby if you need support while practicing balance.

Steps

  1. Stand straight and balance firmly on your left leg.
  2. Lift your right leg and bend your right knee.
  3. Place your right foot against the inside of your left thigh with toes pointing downward.
  4. Join your palms at chest level, then lift your arms overhead.
  5. Hold the position while breathing deeply.
  6. Lower your arms, release your leg, and repeat on the other side.

Benefits

  • Improves balance and stability in the legs.
  • Strengthens feet, hips, and the standing leg.
  • Supports pelvic stability and posture.
  • Builds confidence and focus.
Back to Yoga
